script: echo A; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -i alej || true; echo B; sudo ls /etc/systemd/system/ | grep -i alej || true; echo C; sudo ls /home/azureuser/ | grep -i alej || true; echo D; sudo ls /home/ | grep -i alej || true; echo E; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query [].name -o tsv | grep -i alej || true
